title: Modern Dragon Egg
description: Changes the Ender Dragon Egg model & Item to match the Sniffer Egg
body:
Several old blocks, models, and items were left untouched by Jappa's 1.14 texture update for the sake of preserving nostalgic features and items. Some are fine the way they are, others.... ehhh.

This is a simple resource pack that just changes the Ender Dragon Egg to match the design conventions of modern minecraft. It uses the sniffer egg model, and the texture is a very slight reshade of the default dragon egg texture.
